prompt:
Goal: Create a polished anime character sheet for a futuristic schoolgirl angel character named Yuuka Kinaye, styled like a mobile game profile/spec sheet with clean UI panels, decorative typography, and intentionally pseudo-Japanese/pseudo-English microtext.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, high resolution. White central background with a lavender left border and bright cyan geometric accents at the top and bottom. Use thin pale-gray framing lines, small triangles, dots, diamonds, and tech-interface decorations scattered around the page.

Main subject: One full-body anime girl dominates the left and center of the poster. She has deep violet-purple long twin-tail hair with curled ends, side bangs, glossy highlights, and small cyan hair accessories. She has large purple eyes and a calm, slightly serious expression. A black-and-cyan halo floats above her head. She stands in a confident contrapposto pose, holding a purple smartphone in her left hand while her right hand rests near her waist. Outfit: black blazer with white lapels, white shirt, cyan necktie, short black pleated skirt, oversized white-and-cyan futuristic jacket draped around her shoulders, black gloves, black thigh-high tights, chunky black shoes, and a white utility pouch attached at her hip. Include crisp cel-shaded anime rendering, glossy highlights, clean line art, and a premium character-design-sheet finish.

Layout and visible elements: Use exactly 1 main full-body character illustration. Add exactly 1 large schedule/profile card in the upper right with a cyan header and exactly 5 horizontal table rows. The card title should resemble a character scanning/status panel and include mostly decorative pseudo-text. Add exactly 4 stacked rounded-rectangle portrait thumbnails down the right side, each showing a close crop of the same character with her halo and purple hair; the face area may be softly obscured or simplified like censored preview tiles. Add exactly 1 square logo panel near the center-right containing a large cyan stylized number-like emblem resembling “77”. Add exactly 1 paragraph block of tiny gray placeholder profile text beneath the logo. Add exactly 1 small chibi version of the character near the lower middle, lying or leaning forward with a grumpy expression, a small speech bubble, halo above, and a small keyboard or rectangular board beside her. Add exactly 1 large name label near the bottom reading Yuuka Kinaye in widely spaced pale purple letters, with small decorative ID numbers underneath. Add exactly 1 bottom cyan-and-lavender footer bar with short pseudo-Japanese labels and a small purple emblem.

Text content: The upper-right heading should read approximately CHARACUR SCIANNINGT5 YUUKA with a smaller decorative line of pseudo-Japanese text below it. The schedule card should have a cyan header containing the character name and a status/date-like field, then 5 rows with left-side pseudo labels and right-side times: 19:30, 18:30, 18:30, 18:30, 18:30. Keep most small text intentionally nonsensical, faint, and UI-like rather than fully readable.

Visual style: Modern anime character sheet, Blue Archive-inspired sci-fi school uniform aesthetic, white/lavender/cyan palette, clean vector UI overlays, soft shadows under cards, high-detail polished illustration, sharp cel shading, attractive character design, no photorealism.

Constraints: Keep the page uncluttered but information-rich. Preserve the exact counts: 1 full-body character, 1 schedule card with 5 rows, 4 right-side portrait thumbnails, 1 logo panel, 1 chibi illustration, 1 bottom footer bar. Do not add extra characters, weapons, scenery, or readable branding.
